calendar.matters: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Cristina Paxton.
Petitioner: Amalia Salome Ramirez, present in pro per, was sworn and examined and brought the petition in behalf of her two sons Carlos Alexander Bodoya and Sebastian Aguilera.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name from Carlos Alexander Bodoya to Carlos Alexander Ramirez and from Sebastian Aguilera to Sebastian Ramirez.
Decree signed in open court.
